title: New tools
description: Resource pack that replaces the textures of all tools and weapons
body: This Minecraft texture pack completely updates the look of all the tools and weapons in the game, giving them a new, unique style. Each item has been redrawn with small details to make your adventure in the world of Minecraft even more exciting and visually appealing. From ancient swords to modern pickaxes - enjoy improved graphics and a new level of realism!
